channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-13125] sanity test_418: df and lfs df inodes output mismatch
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Arshad <arshad.super@gmail.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/52270a58-3422-11ea-971c-52540065bddc

test_418 failed with the following error:

'df and lfs df inodes output mismatch:  df -i: 10.2.8.122@tcp:/lustre 3355456 16003 3339453 1% /mnt/lustre,  lfs df -i: filesystem_summary: 3355456 16195 3339261 1% /mnt/lustre'

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

== sanity test 418: df and lfs df outputs match ====================================================== 02:51:42 (1578711102)
Waiting for local destroys to complete
striped dir -i2 -c2 /mnt/lustre/d418.sanity
Filesystem Inodes IUsed IFree IUse% Mounted on
10.2.8.122@tcp:/lustre 3355456 16003 3339453 1% /mnt/lustre

UUID Inodes IUsed IFree IUse% Mounted on
lustre-MDT0000_UUID 838864 10907 827957 2% /mnt/lustre[MDT:0]
lustre-MDT0001_UUID 838864 2145 836719 1% /mnt/lustre[MDT:1]
lustre-MDT0002_UUID 838864 1463 837401 1% /mnt/lustre[MDT:2]
lustre-MDT0003_UUID 838864 1680 837184 1% /mnt/lustre[MDT:3]
lustre-OST0000_UUID 621984 2101 619883 1% /mnt/lustre[OST:0]
lustre-OST0001_UUID 621984 2035 619949 1% /mnt/lustre[OST:1]
lustre-OST0002_UUID 621984 2072 619912 1% /mnt/lustre[OST:2]
lustre-OST0003_UUID 621984 2099 619885 1% /mnt/lustre[OST:3]
lustre-OST0004_UUID 621984 2063 619921 1% /mnt/lustre[OST:4]
lustre-OST0005_UUID 621984 2003 619981 1% /mnt/lustre[OST:5]
lustre-OST0006_UUID 621984 1998 619986 1% /mnt/lustre[OST:6]
lustre-OST0007_UUID 621984 1966 620018 1% /mnt/lustre[OST:7]

filesystem_summary: 3355456 16195 3339261 1% /mnt/lustre

sanity test_418: @@@@@@ FAIL: df and lfs df inodes output mismatch: df -i: 10.2.8.122@tcp:/lustre 3355456 16003 3339453 1% /mnt/lustre, lfs df -i: filesystem_summary: 3355456 16195 3339261 1% /mnt/lustre
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6121:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:21425:check_lfs_df()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:21444:test_418()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6423:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6462:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6308:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:21471:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest/2020-01-10/lustre-reviews-el7_6-x86_64-review-ldiskfs-dne-1_12_70915__1025f6e0-ca1b-4530-8a7c-2ce6b9648086/sanity.test_418.*.1578711128.log
CMD: onyx-40vm1.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-40vm2,onyx-40vm3,onyx-40vm4,onyx-40vm5 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest/2020-01-10/lustre-reviews-el7_6-x86_64-review-ldiskfs-dne-1_12_70915__1025f6e0-ca1b-4530-8a7c-2ce6b9648086/sanity.test_418.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1578711128.log;
dmesg > /autotest/autotest/2020-01-10/lustre-reviews-el7_6-x86_64-review-ldiskfs-dne-1_12_70915__1025f6e0-ca1b-4530-8a7c-2ce6b9648086/sanity.test_418.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1578711128.log
Resetting fail_loc on all nodes...CMD: onyx-40vm1.onyx.whamcloud.com,onyx-40vm2,onyx-40vm3,onyx-40vm4,onyx-40vm5 lctl set_param -n fail_loc=0 fail_val=0 2>/dev/null
done.

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_418 - 'df and lfs df inodes output mismatch: df -i: 10.2.8.122@tcp:/lustre 3355456 16003 3339453 1% /mnt/lustre, lfs df -i: filesystem_summary: 3355456 16195 3339261 1% /mnt/lustre'
item.summary: sanity test_418: df and lfs df inodes output mismatch

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Duplicate of LU-13997.
